allow: Bash(node -e 'const d=require\('\\''./__TRACKED_VAR__'\\''\); console.log\('\\''title:'\\'', d.metadata?.title, '\\''| scenes:'\\'', d.scenes?.length, '\\''| assets:'\\'', d.assets?.length, '\\''| 2D:'\\'', d.engine?.enable2D, '\\''| 3D:'\\'', d.engine?.enable3D, '\\''| physics:'\\'', d.engine?.enablePhysics\)')

Bash(node test-fixtures/capture-real-game.mjs platformer-2d 2D platformer "A small 2D platformer where a fox jumps between platforms, collects glowing fruit, and avoids spiked plants. Keep it tight: one screen, simple controls.")
Bash(node test-fixtures/capture-real-game.mjs runner-3d 3D adventure-tp "Tiny 3D third-person adventure: walk around a low-poly forest clearing and collect glowing shards.")

Bash(node test-fixtures/capture-real-game.mjs platformer-2d-simple 2D platformer "Single screen platformer: a red box player jumps and collects 3 yellow coins, lands on a green ground. Keep it minimal — only meshes, no external images, no audio.")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/engine/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"Minimal 3D scene: a single red cube on a green plane, with ambient light. No assets, no audio, no UI.\\"}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/engine/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"Minimal 3D scene: a single red cube on a green plane, with ambient light. No assets, no audio, no UI.\\"}" -o test-fixtures/real-captures/raw-engine-generate.json)

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('test-fixtures/real-captures/raw-engine-generate.json','utf8'\)\); require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('test-fixtures/real-captures/live-3d-cube.json', JSON.stringify\(d.gameDefinition, null, 2\)\); console.log\('extracted gameDefinition: title=' + d.gameDefinition?.metadata?.title + ' scenes=' + d.gameDefinition?.scenes?.length + ' assets=' + d.gameDefinition?.assets?.length + ' entities=' + d.gameDefinition?.scenes?.flatMap\(s=>s.entities||[]\).length\); console.log\('meta:', JSON.stringify\(d.meta\)\);")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 180 -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/engine/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"A tiny 3D scene: one red box player on a green ground plane. Add ambient light. Pure meshes only. No external assets, no audio, no UI. One scene named main.\\"}" -o test-fixtures/real-captures/raw-engine-generate.json)
